exemple.title: Top 3 — sample comparison
exemple.intro: Demo ranking — replace at init with the niche's real Top (content/data/classements.en.json), built from a SERP check.
tldr: The best overall pick is Model A, ahead of Model B and Model C.
Small budget: Model B offers the best value for money.
Premium: Model C is the most complete.
exemple.methodology: Ranking based on 4 weighted criteria, from public data and independent tests. Updated regularly.

faq.q: What is the best overall pick?
faq.a: Model A: the best balance of performance, price and reliability.

faq.q: What is the best small-budget pick?
faq.a: Model B, the best value for money in the selection.
Yes: editorial selection, no affiliate links or sponsored placement.

items.verdict: The best all-round balance: capable, reliable and well priced. Our default pick for most profiles.
The smart choice when budget comes first: the essentials at a contained price, with a longer warranty.
The most complete and high-end, for those who want the maximum regardless of price.
